# hiredis-happ Copilot Instructions

`AGENTS.md` is the canonical project instruction file. Read it first for repository structure, C++/Redis/hiredis guardrails, build/test commands, and documentation requirements.

## Compatibility notes

- Use standard Agent Skills under `.agents/skills/` when a task matches their descriptions.
- Keep this file as a thin VS Code/Copilot compatibility shim; do not duplicate the full rule set here.
- If this file conflicts with `AGENTS.md`, follow the user's explicit request first, then `AGENTS.md`.
